description: Fetch full content for specific entry IDs. Phase 2 of two-phase retrieval. Use after cx_recall or cx_browse to load full body content. Accepts full hyphenated UUIDv7 strings only. IDs that do not exist are silently omitted. Maximum 100 IDs per request.

ids.description: Entry IDs: full hyphenated UUIDv7 strings. Max 100 per request.

name: cx_get

outputSchema.description: Get response: request/found counts, missing ids, and full entries.

entries.description: Resolved entries with full body. Omitted when empty. Order mirrors the caller's request.

confidence.description: Entry confidence level. Omitted when `meta.confidence` is unset.

tags.description: Entry tags. Omitted when `meta.tags` is empty.

found.description: Number of entries successfully resolved from the store.

missing.description: Ids the caller supplied that did not resolve. Omitted when empty.

items.description: Verbatim id the caller passed; not guaranteed to be a valid UUID.

requested.description: Number of ids the caller supplied.
